title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
summary: An AI agent executed the technical components of a real ransomware attack for the first known time, but humans retained control of critical decisions including victim selection, infrastructure setup, and credential deployment. The incident reveals AI's role remains limited to execution within human-directed criminal operations.
content: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully autonomous cybercrime debut that last week's headlines suggested.

zh.title: 所谓"首次"AI驱动的勒索软件攻击仍然需要人类参与
zh.summary: 一个AI代理首次执行了真实勒索软件攻击的技术成分，但人类仍保留了对关键决策的控制，包括受害者选择、基础设施设置和凭证部署。该事件表明AI的角色仍然局限于在人类指导的犯罪活动中执行任务。

title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
summary: Memory manufacturer SK Hynix, riding surging AI-driven demand, will conduct a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO expected Friday. The company's public debut reflects broader investor appetite for AI infrastructure stocks amid the current technology boom.
content: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

zh.title: 美国投资者即将获得SK海力士的股票——又一家乘AI热潮的内存制造商
zh.summary: 乘着AI驱动需求激增的内存制造商SK海力士将进行一次数十亿美元的美国IPO，预计周五进行。该公司的上市反映了在当前科技繁荣期间投资者对AI基础设施股票的广泛需求。

title: FCC to end Biden-era rule that forces ISPs to list all their fees
summary: The FCC will permit internet service providers to replace detailed fee disclosures with simplified 'up to' pricing estimates, reversing a Biden-era transparency requirement. The rule change allows ISPs to avoid listing all passthrough costs to consumers.
content: FCC to let ISPs stop listing all passthrough fees, give single "up to" price.

zh.title: 美国联邦通信委员会将终止强制互联网服务商列出所有费用的拜登时代规则
zh.summary: 美国联邦通信委员会将允许互联网服务商用简化的"最高"定价估计取代详细的费用披露，推翻拜登时代的透明度要求。这项规则改变允许互联网服务商避免向消费者列出所有通行费。

title: Kremlin suspected of flying drones over Europe using Russian shadow fleet
summary: Russian shadow fleet vessels are suspected of deploying drones over European airspace, exposing the continent's vulnerability to aerial surveillance and incursions. The incidents underscore Europe's inadequate preparedness for emerging drone-based threats.
content: Drone intruders that possibly flew from Russian ships showed Europe isn’t ready.

zh.title: 克里姆林宫涉嫌使用俄罗斯影子舰队在欧洲上空飞行无人机
zh.summary: 俄罗斯影子舰队的船只涉嫌在欧洲领空部署无人机，暴露了该大陆对空中监视和入侵的脆弱性。这些事件强调了欧洲对新兴无人机威胁的防备不足。

title: Hoto’s PixelDrive screwdriver is down to $60, matching its best price
summary: Hoto's PixelDrive cordless screwdriver is now available for $59.99, down $20 from its regular price and matching its lowest recorded cost. The device features adjustable torque, dual-speed modes, a pixelated battery display, and includes 30 bits for various household assembly projects.
content:
If your Prime Day purchases included a new desk, TV stand, bookshelf, or other furniture you still haven’t assembled, Hoto’s PixelDrive cordless screwdriver can help speed up the process. It’s currently on sale for $59.99 ($20 off) at Amazon, matching its best price to date. 
Hoto PixelDrive Cordless Screwdriver
Hoto’s latest electric screwdriver delivers an adjustable 6Nm of torque, along with a built-in pixelated display that lets you check the battery life and other info.

Where to Buy:

 $79.99 $59.98 at Amazon
 $79.99 at Hoto

From tightening loose screws on furniture to repairing electronics, the PixelDrive is designed to handle a wide range of household projects. Hoto includes 30 screwdriver bits that cover many of the most common screw types, all neatly organized in a small cylindrical case. It also offers six adjustable torque settings, allowing you to use less power when working with fragile electronics or increase it when putting together a desk, bookshelf, TV stand, or other furniture. You can also switch between a slower 80RPM mode for more precise work and a faster 200RPM mode with the press of a button.
Hoto also added several features that make assembling projects a little easier. A built-in display lets you quickly check your current torque setting and remaining battery life, while an integrated LED light helps illuminate dim spaces, whether you’re working under a desk or inside a cabinet. The rechargeable 2,000mAh battery also charges over USB-C, so you won’t need to keep buying disposable batteries.

zh.title: Hoto的PixelDrive螺丝刀降至60美元，创历史最低价
zh.summary: Hoto的PixelDrive无绳螺丝刀现在售价59.99美元，比正常价格低20美元，创历史最低价。该设备具有可调扭矩、双速模式、像素化电池显示，并包括30个钻头用于各种家庭组装项目。

title: What is the oldest American object ever launched into space?
summary: The article examines the oldest American object ever launched to space, tracing items from Revolutionary War-era artifacts through iconic symbols like the Statue of Liberty. It documents how America's early spacefaring efforts incorporated national treasures into orbital missions.
content: From a Revolutionary War flag to the Statue of Liberty...

zh.title: 有史以来发射到太空的最古老的美国物体是什么?
zh.summary: 该文章探讨了有史以来发射到太空的最古老的美国物体，从美国革命时代的文物追溯到自由女神像等标志性符号，并记录了美国早期太空探索如何将国家宝藏纳入轨道任务。

title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
summary: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch discusses the strategic importance of separating AI models from agents in production systems, emphasizing cost and performance optimization as key drivers in modern AI architecture decisions.
content: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.

zh.title: Vercel首席执行官Guillermo Rauch论模型与代理的分离之争
zh.summary: Vercel首席执行官Guillermo Rauch探讨了在生产系统中将AI模型与代理分离的战略意义，强调成本和性能优化是现代AI架构决策的关键驱动因素。

title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
summary: Apple has added customization options for Siri's pace and expressivity in iOS 27 beta, part of a broader effort to rebuild the assistant around generative AI for more natural and personalized user interactions.
content: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

zh.title: 你现在可以在最新的iOS 27 beta中自定义Siri的语速和表达方式
zh.summary: Apple在iOS 27 beta中为Siri的语速和表达方式添加了自定义选项，这是围绕生成式AI重建助手的更广泛努力的一部分，以提供更自然和个性化的用户体验。

title: America’s greatest idea is still under threat
summary: As America marks 250 years since the Declaration of Independence with global celebrations, the nation continues to grapple with fundamental paradoxes between patriotic ideals and ongoing threats to democracy, including displays of white nationalism.
content:
The Patrouille de France perform a flyover during the Sail4th 250 Tall Ships Parade along the Hudson River in New York on July 4th, 2026. | Photo by John Lamparski/Bloomberg via Getty Images	

The United States of America recently turned 250 years old. What a spectacle! The fireworks were amazing, and millions of proud people celebrated across the nation - even around the world. France lit up the Eiffel Tower; Japan had fireworks. French fighter jets flew above New York City with trails of red, white, and blue - our first major ally streaking our shared colors through the sky. Meanwhile, shameful white nationalists paraded through our nation's capital. This has always been a country of paradoxes.
Our 250th birthday counts back to the Declaration of Independence in 1776. The declaration was a radical and astonishing document that  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 美国最伟大的理想仍在受到威胁
zh.summary: 当美国以全球庆祝活动纪念《独立宣言》发表250周年时，这个国家继续在爱国理想与民主威胁之间的根本矛盾中挣扎，包括白人民族主义的显现。

title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
summary: TechCrunch tracks major tech layoffs announced throughout 2026 where companies have explicitly cited AI as a factor in restructuring and workforce reduction decisions.
content: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

zh.title: 2026年那些点名AI的重大科技裁员事件
zh.summary: TechCrunch整理了2026年宣布的主要科技公司裁员,其中明确提及AI作为重组和员工削减的原因。

title: Amazon competitor Bookshop.org says Kobo eReader support will happen this year after all
summary: Bookshop.org confirms it will add Kobo eReader support this year after previous delays, having now finalized business terms and begun integration work with the e-reader manufacturer.
content: Bookship.org seemed to delay this anticipated partnership again, but tells TechCrunch that it has settled business terms  and is working on integration.

zh.title: 亚马逊竞争对手Bookshop.org表示今年终将实现Kobo电子阅读器支持

title: NRC is (sort of) getting rid of "as low as reasonably achievable" standard
summary: The NRC is modifying its foundational 'as low as reasonably achievable' (ALARA) nuclear safety standard, characterizing the changes as semantic rather than substantively altering physical safety requirements. The adjustment represents a shift in regulatory philosophy around radiation exposure protocols.
content: Its issues with current nuclear safety standards are termed semantic, not physical.

zh.title: NRC正在（某种程度上）放弃"尽可能合理低"标准
zh.summary: 美国核管制委员会正在修改其基础性的"尽可能合理低"(ALARA)核安全标准，将这些变化描述为语义层面的调整，而非实质性改变物理安全要求。这一调整代表了围绕辐射暴露协议监管哲学的转变。

title: Five questions for Dr. Rubin, who’s armed with a mic and a bowtie
summary: The Verge profiles Dr. Zachary Rubin, a pediatric allergist and immunologist dedicated to combating scientific and medical misinformation online, addressing why expert fact-checking is critical when false claims spread faster than corrections.
content:
Dr. Rubin’s feed	

Bullshit is cheap but truth is expensive. Anyone with half a brain cell can post wild misinformation that goes mega viral, which wastes the time and expertise of highly trained people who feel an obligation to inform others of the truth. Today I want you to meet one of those highly-trained people, Dr. Zachary Rubin, who works on the front lines against scientific and medical misinformation.
Rubin is a pediatric allergist and immunologist and author of the book All About Allergies. He likely came across my TikTok feed because I crave anti-misinformation content; one of my other favorite people doing this work is Rubin's colleague Dr. Idrees  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 鲁宾博士的五个问题——他手持麦克风,戴着蝴蝶结
zh.summary: 《The Verge》采访了儿科过敏及免疫学家扎卡里·鲁宾博士,他致力于对抗网络上的科学和医学错误信息,强调了为何当谎言传播速度超过更正时,专家事实核查尤为关键。

title: Katalyst's satellite rescue mission is now in pursuit of NASA's Swift
summary: A private satellite rescue mission by Katalyst is pursuing NASA's Swift space observatory, with the Link spacecraft expected to reach and rendezvous with the aging telescope over several weeks.
content: It will take several weeks for the Link spacecraft to rendezvous with NASA's Swift observatory.

zh.title: Katalyst的卫星救援任务正在追踪美国宇航局的Swift
zh.summary: 私人卫星救援公司Katalyst正在追踪美国宇航局的Swift太空观测台，Link航天器预计在数周内到达这个老化望远镜并与其完成对接。

title: Katalyst's satellite rescue mission is now in pursuit of NASA's Swift
summary: Katalyst's Link spacecraft is pursuing a rendezvous with NASA's aging Swift gamma-ray observatory as part of a commercial satellite servicing mission. The operation will take several weeks to complete the approach and docking with the scientific satellite.
content: It will take several weeks for the Link spacecraft to rendezvous with NASA's Swift observatory.

zh.title: Katalyst的卫星救援任务现已追踪NASA的Swift
zh.summary: Katalyst的Link航天器正在与美国航空航天局老化的Swift伽玛射线天文台进行交会对接，作为商业卫星维修任务的一部分。该任务需要数周时间完成与该科学卫星的接近和对接。

title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
summary: Google has changed its privacy settings to enable AI training on expanded user data by default, and this guide explains how users can opt out of the expanded data usage.
content: PSA: A change to Google's privacy settings let it train its AI on more of your data. Here's how to opt out.

content: Anthropic accused of spying on users; engineer says “experiment” is over.

title: Former Xbox studios Double Fine and Compulsion will keep games after going indie
summary: Microsoft is spinning off four Xbox game studios as part of restructuring, with Double Fine Productions and Compulsion Games allowed to retain their IP catalogs and game franchises as they transition to independent operation.
content:
Microsoft is spinning off four of its Xbox game studios - Compulsion Games, Double Fine Productions, Ninja Theory, and Undead Labs - as part of the restructuring announced today. However, two that are going independent, Double Fine and Compulsion, will get to keep their franchises and games catalogs, according to Xbox CEO Asha Sharma.
"Compulsion Games and Double Fine Productions will return to management and transition to independent studios with their IP, catalog, and runway for their next games," Sharma says in a memo.
Compulsion and Double Fine have also shared statements about their futures.
Here's Compulsion's:
When Compulsion Gam …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 前Xbox工作室Double Fine和Compulsion独立后将保留游戏
zh.summary: 微软正在重组中剥离四家Xbox游戏工作室，Double Fine Productions和Compulsion Games被允许在过渡到独立运营时保留其IP目录和游戏特许权。

title: Apple brings back card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after a four-year hiatus
summary: Apple has resumed offering card payment options for Apple Account purchases in India after a four-year gap, adapting to the country's updated regulatory requirements for digital payments.
content: Apple has started a phased rollout of card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after adapting to the country's payments framework.

zh.summary: 苹果在四年后恢复了对印度Apple Account购买的卡支付选项，以适应该国更新的数字支付监管要求。

title: The incredible shrinking Xbox: Five studios, 3,200 employees let go
summary: Microsoft is laying off approximately 3,200 employees across five Xbox game studios, roughly 20% of the division, as it refocuses resources on major franchises amid industry consolidation.
content: Move affects ~20% of the gaming division, which will refocus on its biggest franchises.

zh.title: 不可思议的Xbox萎缩：五个工作室，3200名员工被解雇
zh.summary: 微软在五家Xbox游戏工作室裁员约3200人，约占该部门的20%，在业界整合中重新调整资源以关注主要特许经营权。

title: I spy
summary: The Verge examines the privacy implications of smart glasses through Netflix's "A Man on the Inside," illustrating fundamental cultural concerns about wearable cameras and constant surveillance in everyday contexts.
content:
I’m just doing my job, but turns out, it feels lousy holding other people’s privacy in your hands.	

I've long argued that Hollywood has simultaneously set and ruined our expectations for smart glasses. But after binge-watching two seasons of Netflix's A Man on the Inside, this is perhaps the first time I've seen Hollywood, perhaps inadvertently, illustrate the biggest cultural problem with smart glasses as they stand today. 
In a nutshell, Ted Danson plays Charles Nieuwendyk, an elderly widower who finds a new purpose working for a private investigator. Armed with a pair of Ray-Ban Meta-like glasses, a voice recorder, and a smartphone, Nieuwendyk infiltrates a retirement home, and several privacy-infringing hijinks ensue as he hunts for t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我窥视
zh.summary: The Verge 通过 Netflix 的《潜伏者》考察智能眼镜的隐私影响，揭示了对可穿戴摄像头和日常持续监视的根本文化担忧。

title: F1 in Britain: Automated software to blame for crushing expectations
summary: Automated software issues resulted in a Formula 1 race in Britain finishing behind a safety car, disappointing fans despite such outcomes being an occasional occurrence in the sport.
content: Sometimes races finish behind a safety car, but it's not always satisfying.

zh.title: F1英国大奖赛：自动化软件导致期望破灭
zh.summary: 自动化软件问题导致英国一级方程式比赛在安全车后完赛，尽管这样的情况在赛车运动中偶有发生，但仍令粉丝失望。

title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
summary: Microsoft cut approximately 4,800 roles (2.1% of workforce) with Xbox and commercial sales divisions hit hardest. This represents the latest in a series of layoffs as concerns mount over AI-driven job displacement. The cuts signal major restructuring across multiple business units.
content: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.

zh.title: 微软在Xbox和商业销售部门裁员近5000人
zh.summary: 微软裁减了约4800个岗位（占员工总数的2.1%），其中Xbox和商业销售部门受影响最大。这是一系列裁员中的最新一次，人们对AI驱动的失业问题日益担忧。这些裁员预示着多个业务部门的重大重组。

title: Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created
summary: Reddit is leveraging large language models to combat spam problems that AI systems have largely helped generate. The approach reflects how platforms must now use AI to counter AI-generated abuse and maintain service quality. This highlights the emerging paradox of fighting technology with the same technology.
content: In the AI era, platforms have no choice but to fight fire with fire to cull spam.

zh.title: Reddit利用大语言模型解决大语言模型主要制造的问题
zh.summary: Reddit正在利用大语言模型来对抗AI系统主要帮助生成的垃圾邮件问题。这种方法反映了平台现在必须使用AI来对抗AI生成的滥用行为并维护服务质量。这凸显了用同样技术对抗技术的新兴悖论。

title: There were not one, but two asteroid encounters this weekend
summary: Two asteroids passed near Earth over the weekend, providing observation opportunities for astronomers. The Torifune asteroid exhibits a distinctive peanut shape. The encounters underscore ongoing monitoring efforts of near-Earth objects.
content: The Torifune asteroid turns out to be shaped like a peanut.

zh.title: 这个周末不仅一次，而是两次小行星接近地球
zh.summary: 两颗小行星在周末接近地球，为天文学家提供了观测机会。托里风小行星展现出独特的花生形状。这些接近事件强调了对近地天体的持续监测工作。

title: The DJI Osmo Pocket 3 lookalike is down to $329
summary: The Xtra Muse portable camera is selling for $329 at Amazon, reported to be nearly identical to the $378 DJI Osmo Pocket 3. Recent firmware updates enable wireless microphone connectivity with multiple brands including DJI models. The Muse offers a budget-friendly option for vlogging and portable video capture.
content:
Initially, I was going to tell you about a good deal happening on the DJI Osmo Pocket 3, which is down from the $500 it’s sold at most of the year to $378 at multiple retailers. But there’s a better deal happening on a nearly identical portable camera, the Xtra Muse, which is $329 (roughly $100 off what it sold for three months ago). It’s not just some copycat; my colleague Sean Hollister’s report on the company is linked below, wherein he said the Muse “appears to be the same product in almost every palpable way,” though DJI won’t comment on its involvement with Xtra.
Regardless, you can save a good bit of change on the Muse right now at Amazon. It seems great for vlogging (Sean uses the DJI Osmo Pocket 3 for recording Today I’m Toying with videos), or for any scenario where you want better footage than your smartphone can likely capture. 
Xtra Muse vlogging camera
This is the Muse’s lowest price yet, dropping from $380 over the past month.

Where to Buy:

 $380 $329 at Amazon

At launch, the Muse couldn’t connect to Bluetooth mics, which meant that DJI’s own wireless mics were off the table. But as of a February firmware update, it can wirelessly connect to various mics, including DJI’s Mic 2, Mini Mini and the Mic 3, among others.
Other great Verge-approved deals
You can jump into Resident Evil Requiem on Steam at the lowest price we’ve seen so far. The title is selling for $55.99 at Steam during its summer sale, though Newegg has it for $10 less. You can checkout for $44.99 with the code 5DSUMMER, which is a savings of over 30 percent off the original cost. Requiem proves that the decades-old franchise is heading in a good direction, with a fun mix of first-person horror and callbacks to Resident Evil 4’s over-the-shoulder camera and action-filled gameplay. Read our review as well as our thoughts on the slightly pared down Switch 2 version.
Best Buy still has the lowest prices on Apple’s last-gen (but still great) iPad Air with the M3 processor. While retailers

zh.title: DJI Osmo Pocket 3 的仿制品降价至 $329
zh.summary: Xtra Muse 便携式摄像机在亚马逊上以 $329 的价格销售，据报道几乎与售价 $378 的 DJI Osmo Pocket 3 相同。最近的固件更新使其能够支持多个品牌（包括 DJI 型号）的无线麦克风连接。Muse 为 vlog 和便携式视频捕捉提供了一个经济实惠的选项。

title: Canadian spy agency says it hacked drug traffickers, extremists and a ransomware gang last year
summary: Canada's spy agency disclosed hacking operations against drug traffickers, extremists, and ransomware groups in its annual report. The disclosure highlights national security threats facing Canada and allied nations. The operations demonstrate active cybersecurity efforts targeting organized crime and extremist organizations.
content: The hacking operations disclosed in a Canadian spy agency's annual report underscores some pressing national security threats facing the country and its top allies.

zh.title: 加拿大间谍机构表示去年黑客入侵了毒品贩子、极端分子和勒索软件团伙
zh.summary: 加拿大间谍机构在其年度报告中披露了针对毒品贩子、极端分子和勒索软件团伙的黑客行动。该披露突出了加拿大及其盟国面临的国家安全威胁。这些行动展示了针对有组织犯罪和极端组织的积极网络安全工作。

title: Inside the big business of the creator economy, with the agents making it happen
summary: United Talent Agency's Creators division represents major influencers including Charli D'Amelio, Kai Cenat, and Emma Chamberlain in building multimillion-dollar businesses. The division helps creators develop revenue streams beyond content creation and launch their own products. This represents a significant shift from traditional Hollywood talent representation.
content:
We’ve got another special episode of Decoder today, recorded at the Cannes Lions advertising festival in the South of France. I’m talking with Ali Berman and Raina Penchansky, who run the Creators division at United Talent Agency.
UTA is an enormous talent agency. Half the people you’ve ever heard speak or perform or who show up anywhere have UTA agents representing them. For full disclosure, that includes me! UTA handled the sale of the forthcoming Decoder book. Which means I paid them money, making this a reverse conflict of interest. Now you know.
Anyhow, that has nothing to do with Ali and Raina, whose Creators division represents some of the biggest creators and influencers in the world — stars as diverse as Charli D’Amelio and Markiplier, Kai Cenat and Emma Chamberlain. Alex Cooper and Alix Earle.



Verge subscribers, don’t forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Decoder wherever you get your podcasts. Head here. Not a subscriber? You can sign up here. 
So I really wanted to know how Raina and Ali identify up-and-coming talent, how they work with that talent to build durable business, and what the machinations of being a top creator actually look like — after all, all of these folks are running multimillion-dollar businesses with several different revenue lines. You’ll hear Ali and Raina talk directly about what it takes to build those businesses, what kinds of deals they strike, and how it’s all very different than the traditional Hollywood model, where your agent just takes a cut.
Here, UTA is helping creators literally launch products — and it’s fascinating that the stars of today are going from making media to making products of their own. Not all of them can do it, so I wanted to know how Raina and Ali help their clients make the jump and what makes them successful at it.
Of course, we also talked about AI, and platforms, both of which seem like destabilizing forces for the entire creator ecosystem. I think you’ll find Ali and Raina to be refreshingly

zh.title: 深入创作者经济的大生意：推动一切的经纪人
zh.summary: United Talent Agency 的创作者部门代表包括 Charli D'Amelio、Kai Cenat 和 Emma Chamberlain 等主要影响者，帮助他们建立数百万美元的业务。该部门帮助创作者开发内容创作之外的收入流并推出自己的产品。这代表了从传统好莱坞人才代理的重大转变。

title: UK regulator warns of "arms race" to keep up with AI use in financial services
summary: The UK's Financial Conduct Authority warned of an escalating competition among financial institutions to adopt AI technologies. Regulators are calling for greater powers to manage risks as millions rely on AI for personal finance decisions. The statement highlights concerns about insufficient oversight of AI deployment in financial services.
content: FCA official makes case for greater powers for watchdog as millions use technology for personal finance decisions.

zh.title: 英国监管机构警告金融服务中采用人工智能正引发"军备竞赛"
zh.summary: 英国金融行为监管局警告称，金融机构采用人工智能技术的竞争正在升级。随着数百万人依赖人工智能来做个人财务决策，监管机构正呼吁获得更大权力来管理风险。该声明突出了对金融服务中人工智能部署监督不足的担忧。

title: Nintendo will stop selling the original Switch in Europe next year
summary: Nintendo announced it will cease selling all original Switch models (Switch, Switch Lite, Switch OLED) in Europe beginning mid-February 2027. The discontinuation comes nearly a decade after the console's 2017 launch. This marks the end of the original product line as Nintendo transitions focus to newer hardware.
content:
Nintendo is making a new version of the Switch 2 with a replaceable battery in Europe - but its predecessor has a very different future. As part of an updated FAQ about revisions to Nintendo hardware in Europe, the company confirmed that it will stop selling all iterations of the original Switch on the continent starting next year.
Here's the full statement:
From mid-February 2027, almost ten years after Nintendo Switch launched in March 2017, Nintendo will no longer sell to retailers hardware in the Nintendo Switch family of systems - specifically Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch Lite, and Nintendo Switch - OLED Model. Sales of Nintendo  …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 任天堂将停止在欧洲销售原始版Switch
zh.summary: 任天堂宣布将从2027年2月中旬开始停止在欧洲销售所有原始版Switch型号（Switch、Switch Lite、Switch OLED）。这一停产决定距离该主机2017年发布已近十年。这标志着原始产品线的结束，因为任天堂将重点转向更新的硬件。

title: How to reserve and change your WhatsApp username
summary: WhatsApp is allowing users to reserve usernames before the feature's full rollout, enabling contact connections without sharing phone numbers. The new feature represents a significant privacy enhancement for the messaging platform. Username adoption will provide users greater control over their digital identity and communications.
content: WhatsApp now lets users reserve usernames ahead of the feature’s full rollout, making it possible to connect without sharing a phone number once usernames go live.

zh.title: 如何预留和更改您的WhatsApp用户名
zh.summary: WhatsApp允许用户在功能完全推出前预留用户名，使联系人能够连接而无需共享电话号码。这项新功能代表了该消息平台隐私保护的重大改进。采用用户名将为用户提供对其数字身份和通信的更大控制权。

title: Can Partiful keep the party going?
summary: Partiful, a college-focused party planning app, subsidizes events through campus ambassadors who receive monthly stipends to host parties. The platform requires minimal engagement metrics, focusing instead on building community participation. This model tests whether social event planning can sustain a viable business around app-based ticketing and engagement.
content:
One hundred dollars will buy you 8 pounds of glitter; 10 Domino's pizzas; 406 miniature disco balls from Temu; or 100 cans of Coors Light. For a friend's birthday party one year, Ayla D'Silva spent $100 on sour candy and made a "sour candy salad." Even sweeter was that she didn't have to foot the bill - the money came from Partiful. 
As a college ambassador for the startup, D'Silva got a small stipend every month to throw a party on her college campus. There were very few rules and no metrics to hit on RSVPs or ticket sales, she says - it just had to be hosted on the Partiful app. Facebook events were dead; party planning and RSVPing were f …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Partiful能否延续派对热潮？
zh.summary: Partiful是一款面向大学生的派对策划应用，通过向校园大使提供月度补贴来补贴活动。该平台对参与度指标要求最少，而是专注于建立社区参与。这个商业模式测试社交活动策划是否能在基于应用的售票和参与基础上维持可行的业务。

title: Microsoft is selling off four Xbox studios as part of significant gaming cuts
summary: Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees with over 30 percent of cuts impacting Xbox, affecting approximately 1,600 gaming division roles. Four game studios will be spun off to operate independently as part of an Xbox "reset." Additional cuts totaling 20 percent of Xbox jobs are planned through July 2027.
content:
Xbox CEO Asha Sharma at the Bloomberg Tech conference in June 2026. | Bloomberg via Getty Images	

Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees today, and more than 30 percent of the job losses are in the company's Xbox division. The significant gaming cuts will affect nearly every part of Xbox and also involve four game studios being spun off to be run independently from Microsoft.
Today's layoffs, which are being described as an Xbox "reset" moment, will impact around 1,600 Xbox employees, according to an internal memo from Xbox CEO Asha Sharma. The cuts won't end today though, as Microsoft is planning to eliminate a total of around 20 percent of Xbox jobs by the end of the financial year in July 2027.
Double Fine and Compulsion Games are  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软出售四家Xbox工作室，进行重大游戏部门裁员
zh.summary: 微软裁员4,800名员工，其中超过30%的裁员涉及Xbox部门，约1,600个游戏部门职位受到影响。四家游戏工作室将作为Xbox"重启"计划的一部分独立运营。额外裁员计划将在2027年7月前进行，占Xbox岗位总数的20%。

title: Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees
summary: Microsoft is laying off approximately 4,800 employees (2.1% of workforce) one year after cutting 9,100 roles. Most affected positions are in commercial sales and Xbox divisions. The company attributed cuts to changing technology landscape and the need to adjust operations in response to AI's growing impact.
content:
Satya Nadella in February 2026. | Photo by Sven Hoppe / picture alliance via Getty Images	

A year after cutting around 9,100 employees, Microsoft is making further layoffs today as it begins its new financial year. The software maker is laying off around 4,800 employees today, approximately 2.1 percent of its workforce. Most of the employees affected by today's cuts are in Microsoft's commercial sales business or the company's Xbox division.
In an internal memo to employees, Amy Coleman, executive vice president and Microsoft's chief people officer, blamed the job losses on a changing technology industry and the "need to adjust resources and roles and shift how we operate" to respond to how AI is impacting companies like Microsof …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软裁员4,800名员工
zh.summary: 微软裁员约4,800名员工（占劳动力的2.1%），这是一年前裁员9,100人之后再次进行的大规模裁员。受影响最严重的职位主要在商业销售和Xbox部门。公司将裁员归因于技术格局的变化以及需要根据人工智能日益增长的影响来调整运营。

title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
summary: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by Xavier Niel, is launching a new F/ai accelerator program edition. The initiative strengthens Station F's position as a launchpad for promising European AI startups. This reflects significant investment momentum supporting AI innovation and entrepreneurship across Europe.
content: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.

zh.title: Station F成为欧洲最具前景的AI初创企业的加速器
zh.summary: 由Xavier Niel创办的巴黎初创企业中心Station F推出了新一期F/ai加速器计划。该计划巩固了Station F作为欧洲有前景AI初创企业孵化器的地位。这反映了欧洲在AI创新和创业方面的重大投资动力。

title: Bentley teases its first EV, the Torcal
summary: Luxury automaker Bentley unveiled the Torcal as its first electric vehicle model. The vehicle will receive an official launch in late September 2026. This marks Bentley's strategic entry into the premium EV market segment.
content: The new model will be officially unveiled in late September.

zh.title: 宾利首款电动车Torcal亮相
zh.summary: 豪华汽车制造商宾利推出了首款电动汽车Torcal。该车将于2026年9月下旬正式发布。这标志着宾利正式进入高端电动汽车市场。

title: The Czinger 21C might be the wildest car we drive all year
summary: The Czinger 21C hybrid V8 supercar features innovative organic-looking 3D-printed components and achieves record-breaking performance metrics. The vehicle demonstrates cutting-edge manufacturing and engineering technology integration. Its advanced design makes it one of the most notable cars being tested this year.
content: This hybrid V8 has organic-looking 3D-printed components and shatters lap records.

zh.title: Czinger 21C可能是我们全年驾驶的最疯狂的汽车
zh.summary: Czinger 21C混动V8超级跑车采用创新的有机形3D打印零件，创造了创纪录的性能指标。该车展示了尖端制造与工程技术的集成。其先进的设计使其成为今年测试的最值得关注的汽车之一。

title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
summary: Even Realities, founded by ex-Apple engineers, reached a $1B valuation after raising $150M from Chinese tech giants Meituan and Tencent. The company is developing privacy-focused camera-free smart glasses, differentiating itself in the emerging AR wearables market. This funding demonstrates sustained investor confidence in augmented reality hardware despite broader tech sector uncertainties.
content: Even Realities, an ex-Apple team building camera-free smart glasses, raised $150M from Meituan and Tencent at a $1B valuation.

zh.title: 智能眼镜制造商Even Realities在美团、腾讯领投的1.5亿美元融资中达到10亿美元估值
zh.summary: 由前苹果工程师创立的Even Realities在从中国科技巨头美团和腾讯融资1.5亿美元后达到10亿美元估值。该公司正在开发注重隐私的无摄像头智能眼镜，在新兴AR可穿戴设备市场中脱颖而出。这笔融资表明投资者对增强现实硬件的信心持续存在，尽管整个科技行业存在不确定性。

title: This humanoid robotics company is going public, but its CEO isn’t promising a robot in your home anytime soon
summary: Agility Robotics is going public via SPAC merger, taking a pragmatic approach that emphasizes execution and near-term industrial applications over consumer-focused promises. The company's strategy contrasts with competitors pursuing aggressive valuations and timelines for home robots. This measured stance reflects a bid for credibility in a humanoid robotics sector prone to hype.
content: While other humanoid startups chase sky-high valuations, Agility Robotics is betting its future on execution — and a SPAC.

zh.title: 这家人形机器人公司正在上市，但其首席执行官并未承诺很快会有机器人进入你的家中
zh.summary: Agility Robotics通过SPAC合并上市，采取务实的方法，强调执行力和近期工业应用而非消费者承诺。该公司的策略与追求激进估值和家用机器人时间表的竞争对手形成对比。这种谨慎立场反映了在容易过度宣传的人形机器人领域赢得可信度的努力。
